citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:30 PM on 12
May 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by honking car horn upon arrival and calling phone numbers
on file. APHIS Official was able to make contact with the facility representative who would not be available to conduct an
inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:30 PM on 12 
May 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by honking car horn upon arrival and calling phone numbers 
on file. APHIS Official was able to make contact with the facility representative who would not be available to conduct an 
inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and 
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
